title: Puerto Banus Catamaran Charter Group Guide 2026
html:
Puerto Banus offers some of the finest catamaran charters for groups on the Costa del Sol. Starting from Puerto Deportivo, a half-day trip costs around €1,200 for a group of twelve. The marketplace BoatHire24 connects you directly with local owners, making it simple to compare and book the ideal vessel.

How much does it cost to rent a catamaran for a group in Puerto Banus?

A full-day catamaran charter for ten to twelve guests typically ranges from €1,800 to €3,500 in 2026. Variations depend on the vessel size, included extras, and the time of year. For a shared tour, costs are lower, but a private group charter offers personalised itineraries and unlimited time at anchor.

Compare verified boat listings on boat rental Puerto Banus to find the exact match for your group size and budget.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

Most catamaran charters depart from Puerto Deportivo, the main marina in Puerto Banus. This marina is a hub for luxury boats and offers easy access to the Mediterranean. Other departure points include the nearby Marbella Marina, just four nautical miles east, and the exclusive Cabopino Marina to the west. For longer trips, skippers often head toward the Bay of Gibraltar or anchor off the coast of Estepona.

Which boat to rent for a group in Puerto Banus

Choosing the right catamaran depends on your group size and desired amenities. Below is a list of common options for group charters in Puerto Banus.

  1. Catamaran 70ft, best for large parties of up to 20 guests, with a flybridge and water toys, from €2,500 per day. See the Shangani listing for an example.
  2. Motor yacht 50ft, ideal for smaller groups of eight seeking speed and luxury, from €1,800 per day.
  3. Sail catamaran 45ft, quiet and eco-friendly, perfect for twelve guests, from €1,500 per day.
  4. RIB 30ft, a fun option for up to six, ideal for watersports, from €600 per half-day.

Costs of a catamaran charter in Puerto Banus

Prices vary by season and vessel type, but the following bands apply for 2026.

  • Shared group tour: from €80 per person for a four-hour trip.
  • Small motorboat half-day (up to 8 people): from €400.
  • Catamaran full-day (10, 12 guests): from €1,800.
  • Crewed luxury yacht full-day (up to 20 guests): from €3,500.

Do you need a licence to rent a catamaran in Puerto Banus?

If you charter a crewed boat, no licence is needed, the skipper handles everything. For bareboat hire in Spanish waters, you generally need a Recreational Navigation Licence (PER) or an International Certificate of Competence (ICC). The operator confirms exact requirements at the time of booking.

A local tip: book a crewed catamaran for a hassle-free day. The skipper will navigate the afternoon Levante wind, which picks up from noon, ensuring a comfortable sail around the Bay of Marbella.

Season for catamaran charter in Puerto Banus

The high season runs from June to September, with July and August being the busiest months. The Levante wind is common during summer afternoons, providing good sailing conditions. Spring and autumn offer quieter anchorages with mild weather, making them excellent for group charters.

At a glance

  • Price band: €400 to €3,500 per charter
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: half-day (4 hours) or full-day (8 hours)
  • Guest capacity: up to 20 on a catamaran
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

Can we bring our own food and drink on a catamaran charter?

Most charters allow you to bring your own provisions, though some offer catering as an add-on.

What is the cancellation policy for a group booking?

Policies vary by owner, but many offer a full refund if cancelled at least 14 days before departure.

How far can we travel from Puerto Banus on a day trip?

A typical day trip covers 20 to 30 nautical miles, reaching as far as Estepona or Marbella.

Are there any age restrictions for children on board?

Children are welcome, but life jackets must be available for all minors, and some skippers require minimum ages for safety.

To explore the full range of options, visit BoatHire24, the worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Puerto Banus or list your own. Whether you are planning a group celebration or a corporate event, booking through the platform ensures a straightforward experience with verified listings.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
